revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{Commonscat|1870 in Japan}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 8 | d = 7 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 }} [[Category:各年の日本]] Category:1870年の各国|に...'
revision.text: {{Commonscat|1870 in Japan}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 8 | d = 7 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 }} [[Category:各年の日本]] [[Category:1870年の各国|にほん]] [[Category:1870年のアジア|にほん]]

{{Commonscat|1870 in Japan}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 8 | d = 7 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1870年の各国 }}
[[Category:1870年のアジア|にほん]]

{{Commonscat|1870 in Japan}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 8 | d = 7 | y = 0 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1870年の各国 }}
[[Category:1870年のアジア|にほん]] [[Category:1870年代の日本|*0]]

revision.comment: use {{[[Template:Year in country category|Year in country category]]}}, which no longer needs parameters for the year
revision.text: {{Year in country category|Japan|Asia|}} {{Commons category}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

fixing pages in [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

revision.comment: Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1870年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1870]] [[azb:Category:۱۸۷۰-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[az:Category:1870-ci ildə Yaponiya]] [[commons:Category:1870 in Japan]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1870]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۸۷۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1870 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1870 Ճապոնիայում]] [[ku:Category:1870 li Japonê]] [[pt:Category:1870 no Japão]] [[uk:Category:1870 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں 1870ء]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1870 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1870年日本]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Tensha Shinto Prohibition Ordinance]].

Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names

Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1870_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
